sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id Int32, timestamp_micro Int64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, fromUnixTimestamp64Micro(timestamp_micro, 'UTC') AS converted_timestamp FROM test_timestamps;
UPDATE test_timestamps SET timestamp_micro = 9876543210000 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, fromUnixTimestamp64Micro(timestamp_micro) AS converted_timestamp FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1;
